## ✨ What problem does this feature solve? / 这个功能解决什么问题?

A clear description of the problem or use case.
清晰描述要解决的问题或使用场景。

## 💡 Proposed solution / 建议的方案

How would you like the API to look? Code snippet preferred.
你期望的 API 形态是什么？最好附带代码示例。

```python
# example usage
```

## 🔍 Alternatives considered / 考虑过的其他方案

What alternatives have you tried or considered?
你尝试或考虑过的其他做法。

## 📎 Additional context / 补充信息

Links to relevant Hikvision SDK docs, similar projects, screenshots, etc.
相关的海康 SDK 文档链接、类似项目、截图等。
